subject: Re: Top of the hill
body:
no.no.no,no,no,no,,,,,,,the building is too far west The center of the library is important, not how it sits on a piece of paper..  notice the atelier hangs off the cliff..  ANd that is at 124, 

----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: nadja2102@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, February 3, 2007 6:02:54 PM
Subject: Top of the hill


Jeffrey, according to this topo we can fit the buildings into the 124 level without to much earthwork.The main building is 180 by 80.I will send you tomorrow all the dimentions in this plan.
